name: Pumpkin Pie Cake (M_c-tx)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pumpkin, evaporated milk, eggs and spice together well.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased or sprayed 9-inch by 13-inch pan.
3. Sprinkle yellow cake mix over the pumpkin mixture, but do not stir it in.
4. Pour melted butter or margarine over the mix (again, do not stir).
5. Top with pecans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
7. Can be served hot or cold. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
